texto: I was brought up with a scientific outlook on life. It's the way my father deciphers the world - whether it's football, politics or hairstyles. texto: My sister learned she was a carrier for a recessive disease, Bloom syndrome, late in one of her pregnancies. I remember the panicked call and the weeks of worry as she and her husband awaited his test results; if he was also a carrier, this meant their daughter had a one in four chance of being born with the disorder.
